name: kb-pjt-24-2
description: Repository-level tooling for the KB-PJT-24-2 Vue.js and Spring Framework legacy project.

scripts.db:migrate: docker compose --profile tools run --rm flyway migrate
scripts.db:seed:contract: npm run db:migrate && docker compose --profile tools run --rm seed-contract-test
scripts.check: npm run check:guardrails && npm run lint
